summary: Iteration 11 — Frontend-only testing of FINAL Estate Tea landing flow (logo → ready → click-to-play → video plays → slide-down + grain fade → form). All 8 specified behaviors verified PASS on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (375x812). Admin /#admin still accessible with given password.
critical_code_review_comments: Hash-routing for /#admin still relies on the lazy useState initializer in /app/frontend/src/app/page.js. Hard refresh / fresh navigation works, but a same-page hash change does not remount AdminDashboard. Add a `useEffect` with `window.addEventListener('hashchange', ...)` if in-app deep links to #admin are ever required. Not a regression for this iteration's scope.

EntryForm.jsx is ~290 lines and includes a 100-particle grain animation inline plus a <style> block of @keyframes. Consider extracting GrainOverlay into its own component and moving the keyframes into the global stylesheet to reduce re-render cost and improve readability.
Geolocation reverse-lookup uses public nominatim.openstreetmap.org with no User-Agent or backoff; OSM's TOS recommends an identifiable UA. Add toast on failure path.
test_credentials: Admin password: WEUSEDTOBECALLEDHAMLETTEA26 at /#admin — confirmed working (Welcome, Admin toast + Products/Reviews/Orders tabs rendered)
context_for_next_testing_agent: New phase architecture validated. Hero + Form sections are now both rendered in the DOM, wrapped in a `.will-change-transform` container that animates translateY(0) → translateY(-100vh) on the `sliding` state. Grain overlay is fixed position z-[200] with exactly 100 particles, fades via `grainContainerFade 3.5s ease-out 0.5s forwards`. Slide uses `transform 1.8s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.1,0.25,1)`. In headless Playwright the video never loads (readyState=0), so the .catch() fallback in handleGetStarted triggers triggerSlide() after 3s; behavior in real browsers will be driven by the video `onEnded` handler. All data-testids work: entry-wrapper, hero-section, get-started-button, form-section, name-input, entry-submit-button. Admin at /#admin works on full reload — uses admin-password-input testid.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found in the requested flow.

detailed_test_results.test1_logo_smooth_fade: PASS — logo opacity 0.72 at ~1s, transitioning at ~2.2s (opacity ~0.77 reading during transition window confirms smooth ease-in-out). Logo image present in hero-section.
detailed_test_results.test2_ready_phase_button: PASS — get-started-button visible at ~3.5s, parent opacity ~0.96, pointerEvents: auto. Video element in DOM but readyState=0 in headless (expected per request).
detailed_test_results.test3_click_get_started_phase_change: PASS — after click, button parent opacity drops to ~0.08 mid-transition with pointerEvents: none. Button no longer interactive.
detailed_test_results.test4_slide_and_grains: PASS — during slide window: container transform = matrix(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, -920) (animating to -1080), transition='transform 1.8s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1)'. Grain overlay rendered with exactly 100 .rounded-full particles at z-[200] fixed, container opacity ~0.81 fading.
detailed_test_results.test5_form_visible_after_slide: PASS — form-section, name-input, entry-submit-button all rendered. Welcome H2 (gold #D4AF37) + 'PREMIUM TEA EXPERIENCE' subtitle + 'YOUR NAME' label + Enter Store button all visible. Form card opacity=1 after fade-in.
detailed_test_results.test6_submit_name_to_welcome: PASS — entered 'TestUser', clicked ENTER STORE → Welcome screen renders containing 'Welcome' and 'TestUser'.
detailed_test_results.test7_mobile_375x812: PASS — scrollWidth=clientWidth=375 (no horizontal overflow) both on landing and after slide → form. Button + form render fully within viewport. Screenshot confirms layout.
detailed_test_results.test8_admin_dashboard: PASS — /#admin loads Admin Panel login (admin-password-input). Password authenticates → 'Welcome, Admin' toast + Products tab with seeded Estate Premium Tea (250g ₹200, 500g ₹390) IN STOCK + Reviews/Orders tabs render.
